name: claude
description: Use Claude Code from Codex for review, diagnosis, planning, and research.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Claude Code for second-model help
interface.longDescription: Claude Code Companion lets Codex ask the local Claude Code CLI for read-only review, adversarial review, diagnosis, planning, and research while Codex stays in charge. It records heuristic sensitive-context warnings by default, supports strict blocking when requested, and does not set a dollar budget unless the user opts in.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to review my current diff
Run a Claude adversarial review before shipping
Ask Claude for a read-only diagnosis
